characters.description: A returning survivor of Camp Violet and an independent water-and-blood arch-human.
characters.name: Freddy Stern

characters.description: A sentient spirit bound to Freddy's soul. It is a returning ally whose unusual connection to Freddy lets it assist him while remaining one of his most closely guarded secrets.
characters.name: Bloodshed

characters.description: Freddy's former confidant, now compelled to serve Craven. He remains with the clan because its support protects his sister Sarah's opportunity to attend an academy.
characters.name: Mark Affronte

characters.description: A returning four-star public figure who has a contractual claim to interview Freddy and an interest in his survival after Camp Violet.
characters.name: Madame Morlap

characters.description: Mark's sister and an academy student. Her educational future is the leverage that keeps Mark tied to Craven.
characters.name: Sarah Affronte

characters.description: The former four-star leader of Craven and Freddy's captor. He is already dead when this volume begins.
characters.name: Former Craven patriarch

characters.description: Peter Vane's father, who receives the disfigured patient discharged under his son's name and quickly rejects the identification.
characters.name: Matthew Vane

characters.description: The person whose identification is assigned to the disfigured survivor recovered from Camp Violet. The identification is disputed, and Peter's own fate is not established.
characters.name: Peter Vane

characters.description: An air-affinity criminal broker in Imperta who controls genuine records belonging to an associate whose death was never reported. Freddy approaches him for a complete identity history, not merely forged documents.
characters.name: Spike

characters.description: A deceased associate of Spike whose death remains unreported. His preserved life history and official records make the identity valuable to someone needing more than forged papers.
characters.name: Liam Cuttingsworth

characters.description: Freddy registers his own face and second-star status under Liam Cuttingsworth's records, giving him a legal public identity while his past and concealed Craven property remain dangerous.
characters.name: Freddy Stern

characters.description: The five-star imperial ruler whose ether signature authenticates the platinum Tower of York membership card offered during Freddy's identity deal.
characters.name: Empress Kaya

characters.description: The dead Craven patriarch's three-star son and successor. He inherits a weakened clan and asks Mark to stay, linking continued support for Sarah's education to Mark's service.
characters.name: Nahar

characters.description: A water-affinity sea monster imprisoned in Freddy's ethercosm. It explains that Freddy's dark-blue affinity formed from his own soul after their connection.
characters.name: Imprisoned sea monster

characters.description: A man also known as Basilisk who arrives at the office of Craven's new patriarch.
characters.name: Harold Mascot

characters.description: An experienced but still unnamed delver who recruits Freddy to guard equipment and carry corpses on an upcoming expedition, accepting a negotiated 9 percent share.
characters.name: Unnamed party leader

characters.description: The leader of the six-person delve party Freddy joins as a helper under the name Liam.
characters.name: Theodore

characters.description: Theodore's wife and the fire-affinity caster in his six-person delve party as it prepares to take the inexperienced Liam into gorel territory.
characters.name: Beatrice

characters.description: A water-affinity caster in Theodore's party who treats injuries and imposes strict safety rules on the inexperienced helper Liam.
characters.name: Petra

characters.description: The archer in Theodore's experienced six-person delve party, which hires Liam to carry equipment and remain outside its combat formation.
characters.name: Robert

characters.description: A swordsman in Theodore's party with a strength-related talent. An arm-wrestling test with Liam leaves him injured and demonstrates that the new helper is unusually strong.
characters.name: Kyle

characters.description: The earth-affinity brawler in Theodore's established delve party when Liam joins the group as an inexperienced helper.
characters.name: Lance

characters.description: The late Craven leader's unnamed brother. He commands the pursuit of two suspicious looters carrying irreplaceable clan property.
characters.name: Craven recovery leader

characters.description: A Camp Violet scout whose reanimated body can speak and manifests three-star power before Madame Morlap destroys it.
characters.name: Jenny Walker

characters.description: The privileged two-star son of the Santorio Hub's owner. He is organizing a well-funded delve party and repeatedly seeks to recruit Liam.
characters.name: Jacob Santorio

characters.description: An unidentified woman who recognizes signs of Freddy's unusual healing and asks him for part of his body.
characters.name: Sickly woman

characters.description: A powerful Santorio Hub representative who enforces its economic rules and questions Liam about the unusual woman who carried him to safety.
characters.name: Philip Parker

characters.description: A prospective member of Jacob Santorio's well-equipped delve party.
characters.name: Rachel Black

characters.description: The full name of Theodore, the former delve-party leader who has joined Jacob Santorio's proposed group and warned Freddy about its recruitment effort.
characters.name: Theodore Osborne

characters.description: The sickly woman who recognized Freddy's extraordinary recovery. She can manipulate life sparks, creates a renewable healing resource from his tissue, and enters a secret partnership with him.
characters.name: Sophia Sommer

characters.description: A man and a woman held in Craven's secret prison. They appear to be ordinary humans, but magical censorship prevents them from discussing parts of their history.
characters.name: Secret Craven prisoners

characters.description: A remarkably fast and technically accomplished saber user newly added to Jacob's party. Jacob expects her ability to outgrow the group quickly.
characters.name: Karen

characters.description: An unidentified one-armed man who maintains the runic seal trapping people inside a passage realm. He regrets their deaths but considers the sacrifice necessary to give children a chance at salvation.
characters.name: One-armed seal keeper

characters.description: The owner of the Santorio Hub and Jacob Santorio's father.
characters.name: Leonard Santorio

characters.description: An experienced delver trapped near the central barrier with his sister Jean and their companion Rick as the sealed passage fills with stranded people.
characters.name: Jack

characters.description: Jack's sister, an experienced rapier user who moves with wind assistance. She is among the delvers trapped at the sealed central passage.
characters.name: Jean

characters.description: The experienced companion of Jack and Jean, trapped with them and a large crowd of delvers at the sealed central passage.
characters.name: Rick

characters.description: A fully armored man who escapes the cult massacre with the surviving delvers. The cultists recognize him and deliberately allow the group to leave, while his identity and purpose remain opaque.
characters.name: Armored survivor

characters.description: A scorpion-tailed three-star cult operative who directs the effort to stop Bloodshed's rogue skeletal body and recover the mummified arm it carried.
characters.name: Ilya

characters.description: A massive cult brawler who helps fight Bloodshed's rogue skeletal body.
characters.name: Damien

characters.description: A cult operative who uses levitation at severe physical cost while fighting Bloodshed's rogue skeletal body.
characters.name: Peter

characters.description: A five-star imperial assassin with light, dark, and air affinities. She covertly escorts Madame Morlap to Empress Kaya and can bypass ordinary security.
characters.name: Leona

characters.description: The former identity claimed by the five-star leader behind the cult operation. He reveals the connection while confronting Empress Kaya as the sealed-realm plan collapses around them.
characters.name: Silverheart

characters.description: A conscious crimson construct formed from ether whose power exceeds an Eidolon's. It enters the sealed realm, destroys Empress Kaya's construct, and kills the cult leader as he flees.
characters.name: Crimson Asura

characters.description: The full name of Beatrice, Theodore's estranged wife and a surviving member of the sealed-realm disaster, as reported after Liam returns to public life.
characters.name: Beatrice Osborne

characters.description: Nahar's uncle and successor as Craven patriarch. He plans to relocate the weakened clan and disband Craven Industries, endangering the arrangement that supports Sarah's education.
characters.name: New Craven patriarch

characters.description: An unidentified supernatural figure with Freddy's face that appears in Mark's recurring dream. It grants Mark new power after he agrees to free two followers imprisoned by Craven.
characters.name: Freddy-faced dream figure

characters.description: A powerful figure who intercepts Mark's fleeing family, knows about the prison break, and offers help escaping imperial punishment for an unspecified price.
characters.name: Snake-eyed broker

characters.description: The archer in the four-person group that ambushes Liam near a lava lake during his first expedition into a volcanic public realm. He attacks alongside Theodore, Jacob, and Randy.
characters.name: Grant

characters.description: The spearman in Theodore and Jacob's four-person ambush group. He helps lure Liam into an attack beside a lava lake in the volcanic public realm.
characters.name: Randy
